body.text:
{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191345ED852CBE913172DFB23F"}"},"total":787},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7531029591897473817","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的好甜好好看，好心疼温然的童年[快哭了]，他真的很坚强很努力，心思也很敏感但是江延真的超宠的，看得出他真的很爱温然，也会注意他的各种小心情（其实我理想的爱情就该是这样的）…看的我真的好感动好喜欢…🥹"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753457009,"group_id":"7457891468460428312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwbyu9mCZN6HJP6JhI8m5K0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/739b207f087c464680d3ca2665901e79~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787887&x-signature=MA%2B45Yw%2BSCBw5bV22uyNRWHTNrs%3D","user_id":"515038538894375","user_name":"吃饭加辣加辣"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"515038538894375","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7457891468460428312","book_info":{"abstract":"温燃为了摆脱前男友的纠缠，随手抓了一个帅哥亲了一口。
帅哥抓着他的手腕，眼神慵懒：“啧，你不打算负责？”
温燃：？？？
-
温燃就这样稀里糊涂地和帅哥纠缠到了一起。
可他后来才知道，对方是真正的天之骄子，家世好成绩好，还有一位漂亮大方的青梅竹马最近要回国。
本着与其被踢走还不如自己先离开的想法，他删除了对方的所有联系方式，一股脑跑进了电竞圈。
-
新赛季开始，电竞圈就爆了一条特大新闻。
一年前退役的联盟大魔王打野Wind高调宣布复出，被记者问及原因时，江延只说了四个字：
“来找对象。”
在外界纷纷猜测大魔王的对象究竟是何方神圣时，一条短视频大爆全网。
昏暗的休息室里：“亲我一口，带你拿冠军。”
温燃本以为自己这样的人，就是阴沟里的老鼠，见不得天日，会一辈子烂下去，从未想到有一天，会有一个人把他当作珍宝一般小心翼翼地捧在手里:“燃燃，跟我回家。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e2761a7a4a3cc2ebbbcdbbef18c4e66f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"白色银杏叶","author_id":"","book_id":"7457891468460428312","book_name":"吻了电竞大神后他总在撩我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202838","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4267人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7459782801408150552","read_count":"4267","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"497658"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"155","tags":"双男主,直播,HE,电竞,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e2761a7a4a3cc2ebbbcdbbef18c4e66f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448425&x-signature=OAg2gBVbN3UhqJC9E6PmqsfqvgQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"249"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323191345ED852CBE913172DFB23F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":26213,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39659,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1940},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7465600145528046360","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一章章看下来，给我的感觉不错[送心]，我不爱玩游戏但不妨碍我看电竞小说，虽然有时候不会的特殊名词不会，像ADC、中路啊都要求助朋友，不过还是有点乐在其中，知道了一些以前不知道的东西很有成就感。燃燃给我的感觉像江说的小野猫那样，有自己的柔软和狠厉，面对江伸出猫爪但又露出软乎乎的肉垫，看的我心都化了。江也很温柔，会第一时间察觉到燃猫猫的情绪并且做出措施。主cp很甜，副cp也是，十九秒变大狗狗的样子很好笑，小橙子温柔细腻到好想和他贴贴。祝你们长长久久幸福美满！[快哭了]最后祝你们新年快乐！[爱心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738225460,"group_id":"7457891468460428312","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"花也可以在荒漠盛开，鱼也能够在戈壁浅游。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyFqJrE43bXKPZTr/p4/btOCETlrm7sTnJElrS29Dlse","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2d3d7146d9b2430cba3523e765d49ad5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788106&x-signature=RsnLqkUNExkpAfiaRz77CIWpCyc%3D","user_id":"1359462635409118","user_name":"折花送君动春心"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1359462635409118","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7457891468460428312","book_info":{"abstract":"温燃为了摆脱前男友的纠缠，随手抓了一个帅哥亲了一口。
